title: Sharp-tec Long Nose Pliers 160mm with Soft Grip Handles, Heavy Duty Nose Side Cutting Pliers
features: 【Premium Design】 — 160mm Long Nose Wire pliers are made of high carbon steel, overall heat treatment, provides extra strong and enduring jaws and cutting edges that won't dull
【Precision Design】 — Safety wire pliers with long serrated jaws to pull, push, and twist without slipping. High-quality springs for longer life, and minimized hand fatigue
【Non-slip handles】 — Comfortable handle with concave-convex feeling design, reduced friction, anti-slip, and the handles provide overall control, making them more comfortable and secure

【Wide Use】 — Long nose pliers with fine tips to work in hard-to-reach areas, excellent for a hobby, craft use, jewelry making, artisans, electricians, grips small parts, bend wire, electronics repair, small object gripping, etc. Be used for bending, shaping, or cutting wires

【After-sales Service】— We are a British producer of professional tools. Sharp-tec will let you achieve the correct balance between use safety, dexterity, performance, and price. Please do not hesitate let us know if you have any questions.
description: Product Description Long Nose Pliers 160mm/200mm Premium Construction for Lasting Performance Comfortable enough for all-day use Fishing gear maintenance and repairs General DIY and home improvement tasks Jewelry making and craft projects Electrical work and wiring installations Electronics repair and component work Ergonomic Grip for Easy Control Anti-slip thermoplastic rubber (TPR) coating that maintains secure hold Vibration-dampening design reduces hand fatigue by 30% during extended use Optimized weight distribution for perfect balance and control Flexibility & Durability Heat-treated joint withstands repeated twisting motions Reinforced pivot point ensures smooth operation over thousands of cycles Forged from high-carbon steel with full heat treatment for maximum durability Fine Pointed Tips Handle Delicate Tasks Tapered half-round profile accesses spaces just 3mm wideM icro-textured gripping surface prevents wire slippageN eedle-nose tip precision handles components as small as 0.5mm Side Cutter Combination Pliers Long Nose Pliers Insulated Side Cutters 3Pcs 8-Inch Pliers Set 4Pcs 8-Inch Pliers Set Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Price £9.59 £ 9 . 59 £9.29 £ 9 . 29 £9.29 £ 9 . 29 £12.59 £ 12 . 59 £19.99 £ 19 . 99 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 Available Sizes 6"/8" 6"/7"/8" 6"/8" 6"/8" 8" 8"
